headline: C.H. Robinson waives fuel card fees amid rising diesel costs
summary: C.H. Robinson is waiving fees on discount-fuel cards and cash advances for contract carriers in April and May as diesel prices rise amid the Middle East conflict. The post C.H. Robinson waives fuel card fees amid rising diesel costs appeared first on FreightWaves.
